What we do

Every Service, Done to a Higher Standard

From full exterior repaints to cabinet refinishing — same prep, care, and attention to every job, big or small.

Exterior Painting

Full prep — pressure wash, caulk, prime — before a single coat goes on. Weather-resistant finish that lasts.

Get estimate →

Interior Painting

Clean lines, protected floors, no overspray. Premium low-VOC paints in any color, any room.

Get estimate →

Cabinet Painting

Factory-smooth finish without the cost of new cabinets. Kitchen or bath — same meticulous process.

Get estimate →

Deck & Fence Staining

Extends your deck’s life and brings out the wood grain. Full prep — no shortcuts.

Get estimate →

Power Washing

Siding, driveways, decks, patios. Gets the surface right before paint — or a standalone seasonal refresh.

Get estimate →

Not sure what you need?

Zachary will walk your property, give you an honest assessment, and quote the job clearly — no pressure, no surprises.

Meet the owner

Built on the Vine.
Built on the Right Way.

“Painting isn’t something I learned in a classroom. I grew up doing it with my dad in Kalamazoo’s Vine neighborhood — and that’s still the standard I hold myself to.”

Zachary Pejka is the founder and sole operator behind every Pejka Painting job. A Western Michigan University Business grad with four years of hands-on experience, Zach built this company around one commitment: doing the job right and treating every homeowner with respect.

Zachary Pejka
Owner, Pejka Painting · Kalamazoo, MI
